.canvas-card-menu.background: rgb(30, 30, 30) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.file-embed.background: rgb(34, 34, 34) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.metadata-container.background: rgb(34, 34, 34) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.multi-select-pill.background: rgba(138, 92, 245, 0.075) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(25, 25, 25) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

blockquote.background: rgba(138, 92, 245, 0.05) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, #414141 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#414141, color-mix(in srgb, #414141 65%, transparent))
body.--font-editor-theme: system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Inter, Ubuntu, sans-serif
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, #414141 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#414141, color-mix(in srgb, #414141 65%, transparent))
body.background: rgb(25, 25, 25) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(25, 25, 25) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked::after.background: rgb(25, 25, 25) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgb(30, 30, 30) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(34, 34, 34) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgba(236, 235, 0, 0.4) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(34, 34, 34) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(34, 34, 34) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr.background: rgb(30, 30, 30) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(even).background: rgb(30, 30, 30) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(odd).background: rgb(30, 30, 30) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

td.background: rgb(30, 30, 30) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

th.background: rgb(30, 30, 30) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

thead th.background: rgb(30, 30, 30) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tr.background: rgb(30, 30, 30) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
